metadata.title: Vlad Weby
metadata.description: Web developer & AI specialist based in Bratislava. Modern websites that earn - not just look good.

about.intro: I build websites that earn - not just look good. Modern development, AI tools, and measurable results at a price that doesn't require agency budgets.
about.aboutMeText: I handle every project personally - from the first call to launch. A good website isn't about pixels - it's about how many customers it brings you. Four languages, one contact, zero overhead.

experience.description: AI automation and high-performance web development for businesses across Central Europe.

services.mainTitle: Business thinking, AI expertise, and freelance flexibility - at a fair price.

ai.heading: AI & Automation
ai.para: AI chatbots that handle customer inquiries, workflow automation that eliminates repetitive tasks, and API integrations that connect your tools. Less manual work, more clients, faster growth.

chatgptShopping.heading: ChatGPT Shopping
chatgptShopping.para: Register your e-shop in ChatGPT and Bing so your products appear directly in AI search. Feed integration, schema.org and OpenAI Merchant for WooCommerce, Shopify, PrestaShop and Magento.

speed.heading: Weeks, Not Months
speed.para: Landing pages launch in days. Full websites go live in 1–2 weeks. Fast because the process is efficient — not because corners are cut.

seo.heading: SEO & Performance Built In
seo.para: Every site is built for search engines from day one — fast loading, mobile-first, proper structure. Not an afterthought, not an upsell.

direct.heading: Direct Communication
direct.para: No account manager. You talk directly with the person building your website. One contact, zero overhead.

earn.heading: Websites That Earn
earn.para: Landing pages, business websites, web apps — designed to convert visitors into customers. Clean design that works for your business, not just looks good in a portfolio.

stanislav.name: Stanislav Zavydniak
stanislav.review: Good experience. Website done in 3 days. Nice price compared to others. Recommend.

oleg.name: Tsapenko Oleg
oleg.review: Huge thanks to Vlad! He built our website and helped promote the company - the result exceeded all expectations. Vlad is a true professional, attentive to details, always available and ready to offer the best solutions. Very happy with the collaboration, definitely recommend!

katerina.name: Katerina Fetisova
katerina.review: Came to Vlad with a complex request. Vlad was very patient with all my ideas, implemented quickly, suggested his own options, made corrections. Vlad will remain my reliable partner, as he proved himself a professional ready to responsibly and quickly solve tasks. Thank you from the bottom of my heart!

pricing.mainTitle: Transparent pricing. High ROI. No hidden agency fees.

cookie.message: This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy | Vlad Weby
cookies.description: Cookie policy for vladweby.com. Learn how we use cookies on our website.
cookies.heading: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1text: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the website owners. This Cookie Policy explains what cookies we use, why we use them, and your choices regarding their use.
cookies.s2text: We use cookies for the following purposes:
cookies.s2essentialText: — These are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable basic features such as page navigation and access to secure areas. The website cannot function properly without these cookies.
cookies.s2preferenceText: — These cookies allow the website to remember your choices (such as your cookie consent preference) and provide enhanced, more personalized features.
cookies.s2analyticsText: — These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve the website experience.
cookies.s4text: As a visitor from the European Union, you have certain rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the ePrivacy Directive. These include:
cookies.s4right1: The right to be informed about how your data is collected and used
cookies.s4right2: The right to access the personal data we hold about you
cookies.s4right3: The right to request correction of inaccurate personal data
cookies.s4right4: The right to request deletion of your personal data
cookies.s4right5: The right to withdraw your consent at any time
cookies.s4right6: The right to lodge a complaint with the Slovak Data Protection Authority (Urad na ochranu osobnych udajov Slovenskej republiky)
cookies.s5text: You can control and manage cookies in several ways:
cookies.s5bannerText: — When you first visit our website, you can choose to accept or decline non-essential cookies.
cookies.s5browserText: — Most web browsers allow you to manage cookies through their settings. You can set your browser to refuse cookies or to delete cookies that have already been set. Note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of the website.
cookies.s5clearText: — You can clear your browser's local storage at any time to reset your cookie consent preference.
cookies.s6text: We may use third-party services that set their own cookies (for example, embedded content or analytics). We do not have control over these cookies. Please refer to the respective third-party privacy policies for more information about how they use cookies.
cookies.s7text: The data controller responsible for this website is:
cookies.s8text: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this page periodically to stay informed about how we use cookies.
cookies.s9text: If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy or our use of cookies, please contact us:

privacyPolicy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.s1text: This Privacy Policy explains how Vlad Weby (Vladislav Khvorov), based in Bratislava, Slovakia, collects, uses, stores and protects your personal data when you visit vlad-weby.sk or use any of our services. We process personal data in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (the General Data Protection Regulation, or GDPR) and Slovak Act No. 18/2018 Coll. on Personal Data Protection.
privacyPolicy.s2text: The controller responsible for your personal data is:
privacyPolicy.s3text: Depending on how you interact with us, we may collect the following categories of personal data:

s3items.label: Identification data
s3items.text: first name, last name, business/company name (if applicable).

s3items.label: Contact data
s3items.text: email address, phone number, postal address (only if relevant to an invoice or contract).

s3items.label: Communication data
s3items.text: content of messages you send through our contact form, email, WhatsApp, or calendar booking.

s3items.label: Project data
s3items.text: information you share about your website, business, or goals during a consultation.

s3items.label: Billing data
s3items.text: company registration number (IČO/DIČ), VAT ID, invoicing address, payment information.

s3items.label: Technical data
s3items.text: IP address, browser type, device information, referrer URL, pages visited, and timestamps — collected via server logs and analytics.

s3items.label: Cookie data
s3items.text: information stored in cookies and local storage — see our Cookie Policy for details.

privacyPolicy.s4text: We process your personal data only for specific, legitimate purposes:
s4items: Responding to your inquiries and providing a project quote
Concluding and performing a contract for website, SEO, AI chatbot or other services
Issuing invoices and meeting accounting and tax obligations
Sending service-related emails and project updates
Improving our website, services, and user experience
Protecting our website from fraud, abuse, and security threats
Complying with legal obligations under EU and Slovak law
privacyPolicy.s5text: We process personal data on one of the following legal grounds, in line with Article 6 GDPR:

s5items.label: Performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR)
s5items.text: when we need your data to deliver the services you have ordered.

s5items.label: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR)
s5items.text: for invoicing, tax, accounting and record-keeping duties under Slovak law.

s5items.label: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR)
s5items.text: to maintain website security, prevent fraud and improve our services.

s5items.label: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR)
s5items.text: for non-essential cookies, analytics and any optional marketing communication. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.

privacyPolicy.s6text: We only share personal data with trusted service providers that help us run our business. These processors act on our instructions and are bound by data processing agreements:

s6items.label: Hosting provider
s6items.text: stores website data and server logs on servers located in the European Union.

s6items.label: Email provider (Google Workspace / Gmail)
s6items.text: used to send and receive email communication.

s6items.label: Analytics (Google Analytics 4)
s6items.text: provides anonymised website usage statistics — only with your consent.

s6items.label: Booking tool (Google Calendar)
s6items.text: used to schedule free consultations you request.

s6items.label: Accounting provider
s6items.text: processes invoices and accounting records as required by Slovak law.

privacyPolicy.s7text: We keep your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected or as required by law:

s7items.label: Contact form and consultation messages
s7items.text: up to 12 months from last contact, unless a contract is concluded.

s7items.label: Contract and client data
s7items.text: for the duration of the contract and 10 years thereafter (Slovak accounting and tax law).

s7items.label: Invoices and accounting records
s7items.text: 10 years in line with Slovak Act No. 431/2002 Coll. on Accounting.

s7items.label: Server logs
s7items.text: up to 6 months for security and troubleshooting.

s7items.label: Cookies
s7items.text: for the lifetime defined in our Cookie Policy or until you withdraw consent.

privacyPolicy.s8text: Your personal data is primarily processed within the European Economic Area (EEA). Where a sub-processor (for example, Google) transfers data outside the EEA, we rely on the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses or an adequacy decision to ensure an equivalent level of protection.
privacyPolicy.s9text: As a data subject, you have the following rights under Articles 15–22 of the GDPR:

s9items.label: Right of access
s9items.text: to obtain confirmation of whether we process your data and receive a copy of it.

s9items.label: Right to rectification
s9items.text: to have inaccurate or incomplete data corrected.

s9items.label: Right to erasure
s9items.text: to request deletion of your data (the "right to be forgotten"), subject to legal exceptions.

s9items.label: Right to restriction
s9items.text: to limit how we use your data in certain situations.

s9items.label: Right to data portability
s9items.text: to receive your data in a structured, commonly used machine-readable format.

s9items.label: Right to object
s9items.text: to processing based on legitimate interest, including profiling.

s9items.label: Right to withdraw consent
s9items.text: at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

privacyPolicy.s9contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at v.hvorov73@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days as required by the GDPR.
privacyPolicy.s10text: If you believe we have not handled your personal data in accordance with the law, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Slovak supervisory authority:
privacyPolicy.s11text: We apply appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, loss, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include HTTPS/TLS encryption, secure hosting within the EU, access control, regular backups, and security updates. Despite our efforts, no online transmission or storage method is 100% secure.
privacyPolicy.s12text: Our services are intended for businesses and individuals aged 16 and over. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it without delay.
privacyPolicy.s13text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our services, legal requirements, or best practices. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
privacyPolicy.s14text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or the way we handle your personal data, please contact us:

form.emailNotPublished: Your email address will not be published. Required fields are marked *

workProcessModal.label: HOW WE WORK
workProcessModal.title: Work process
workProcessModal.step1Desc: We discuss your goals, target audience, and project scope. You get a clear quote within 24 hours.
workProcessModal.step2Desc: You receive a visual prototype of your website. We refine until you love it — unlimited revisions at this stage.
workProcessModal.step3Desc: Clean code, mobile-first, SEO-optimized. AI integrations and chatbots wired in if needed.
workProcessModal.step4Desc: Cross-browser testing, speed optimization, analytics setup. Your site goes live in 3–5 business days.
workProcessModal.step5Desc: Ongoing updates, performance monitoring, and new features as your business evolves.

common.finalCtaDesc: Book a free 30-minute consultation. I'll reply within 24 hours with a tailored proposal for your project.

webDesign.heroSubtitle: Modern, responsive websites that load in under 2 seconds, rank on Google, and convert visitors into customers. Ready in 3–5 business days.
included: Fully responsive design — perfect on mobile, tablet and desktop
SEO-ready structure with clean semantic HTML and schema.org markup
Free SSL certificate and HTTPS-secured hosting
Page load under 2 seconds with optimized images (WebP/AVIF)
Easy-to-manage CMS so you can update content yourself
Contact forms with spam protection and email notifications
Multilingual setup (SK/EN/DE/RU) if needed
Google Analytics 4 and Search Console integration

plans.name: Landing Page
plans.description: A single-page website focused on conversion. Perfect for launching a product, service or campaign.

plans.name: Corporate Website
plans.description: A full multi-page website with CMS for companies that need more than a single landing page.
features: Up to 8 pages (Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact…)

audience: Small businesses launching or rebuilding their online presence
Entrepreneurs and solo founders who need a pro site without agency cost
Service providers (salons, restaurants, auto services, coaches)
Companies expanding into Slovak, Czech, German or English markets

faqs.q: How long does it take to build a website?
faqs.a: A landing page is ready in 3–5 business days. A corporate website with CMS takes 7–14 days, depending on the content volume and revisions.

faqs.q: Do I need to provide the content?
faqs.a: You can provide your own copy and images, or I can help write SEO-friendly content and source high-quality imagery.

faqs.q: Is hosting and domain included?
faqs.a: Hosting and domain are separate — typically €5–15/month. I'll help you pick the right provider and set everything up.

faqs.q: Can I edit the website myself later?
faqs.a: Yes. Every site comes with a simple CMS so you can update texts, images, and blog posts without touching code.

faqs.q: What about SEO?
faqs.a: Every site ships SEO-ready: clean URLs, meta tags, schema.org, sitemap, fast load speed. For ongoing SEO work, see the SEO Services package.

seo.heroSubtitle: Get found on Google. Local and technical SEO for small businesses in Slovakia and Central Europe. First results in 2–3 months.
included: Keyword research focused on buyer-intent queries in your market
Technical SEO audit (Core Web Vitals, indexing, crawlability)
Local SEO setup — Google Business Profile and local citations
Schema.org markup (LocalBusiness, FAQ, Product, Service)
On-page optimization — titles, meta, headings, internal links
Monthly transparent reports with rankings and traffic data
Content recommendations and on-demand article optimization
Competitor analysis and opportunity spotting

plans.name: SEO Starter
plans.description: Ideal for small local businesses that want to show up on Google Maps and get steady organic traffic.

plans.name: SEO Growth
plans.description: For companies that want to dominate their niche and build long-term organic traffic.

audience: Local businesses wanting to rank on Google Maps in their city
Service-based companies competing for high-intent keywords
E-shops needing more organic traffic without paid ads
Companies that invested in a website but aren't getting visitors

faqs.q: How fast will I see results?
faqs.a: Local SEO can show first ranking improvements in 4–6 weeks. Broader SEO typically takes 2–3 months to show measurable traffic growth, and 6+ months for significant results.

faqs.q: Is there a minimum contract?
faqs.a: No long-term contract. The service runs month-to-month. Most clients stay because the results compound over time.

faqs.q: Do you guarantee first page rankings?
faqs.a: No serious SEO professional guarantees rankings — Google's algorithm decides. What I guarantee is a clear strategy, measurable work, and transparent reporting.

faqs.q: What's included in the monthly report?
faqs.a: Keyword rankings, organic traffic, top landing pages, Google Business Profile insights, and a clear list of what was done and what's next.

faqs.q: Can you do SEO on my existing website?
faqs.a: Yes. I start with a full audit and then fix technical issues, optimize content, and build authority. Works with WordPress, Shopify, custom sites, etc.

aiChatbot.heroSubtitle: 24/7 customer support, automated bookings, and multilingual conversations — on your website, Instagram, Facebook, and Telegram.
included: 24/7 AI-powered customer support trained on your business data
Integrated booking system — appointments straight into your calendar
Multi-platform: Website widget, Instagram DM, Facebook Messenger, Telegram
Multilingual conversations in SK, CZ, EN, DE, RU
Lead capture with automatic email/SMS notifications
Conversation history and analytics dashboard
Smooth human handoff when the bot reaches its limits
GDPR-compliant with EU data hosting

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Launch your AI chatbot on your website and one social channel. Includes training on your content.
features: Training on your FAQ and services

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Ongoing hosting, model updates, and continuous improvements based on real conversations.

audience: Salons, clinics and studios that need 24/7 booking
Restaurants and cafés handling reservations and FAQs
Auto services, repair shops and local service businesses
E-shops that want to reduce support workload and capture leads

faqs.q: How is this different from a regular chatbot?
faqs.a: This is a real AI chatbot powered by GPT-class models — it understands context, handles nuanced questions, and learns from your specific business data. It's not a rigid script tree.

faqs.q: How long does setup take?
faqs.a: Typical setup takes 5–7 business days — that includes training on your content, integrations, and testing across all channels.

faqs.q: Will it replace my team?
faqs.a: It handles repetitive questions, bookings, and after-hours inquiries. Complex cases are smoothly handed off to a human team member with full context.

faqs.q: What about data privacy and GDPR?
faqs.a: All conversations are stored on EU servers, encrypted in transit and at rest. Users get a clear consent notice, and data retention follows GDPR.

faqs.q: Can the chatbot book appointments into my calendar?
faqs.a: Yes. It integrates with Google Calendar, Outlook, and most booking systems. Customers book directly through the chat — no phone calls needed.

chatgptShopping.heroSubtitle: Get your products discovered inside ChatGPT and Bing. Product feed integration, schema.org, and OpenAI Merchant setup for WooCommerce, Shopify, PrestaShop and Magento.
included: Bing Merchant Center account setup and product feed submission
Schema.org Product, Offer and Review markup on every product page
OpenAI Merchant registration and ChatGPT Shopping listing
Google Analytics 4 setup with e-commerce event tracking
Feed optimization — titles, descriptions, categories, images
Technical SEO for AI search (GEO optimization)
Integration with WooCommerce, Shopify, PrestaShop or Magento
Monthly performance report and ongoing feed health checks

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Full initial integration — your products appear in ChatGPT Shopping and Bing in 2–4 weeks.
features: Works with WooCommerce / Shopify / Prestashop / Magento

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Ongoing optimization: feed quality, new products, schema updates and AI search monitoring.

audience: E-shops on WooCommerce, Shopify, PrestaShop or Magento
Brands that want to appear in AI-generated shopping answers
Stores already using Google Shopping who want to expand to AI channels
Merchants targeting Central and Western European markets

faqs.q: Do I need a Google Shopping feed?
faqs.a: Not required — but if you have one, setup is faster. If not, I'll build the feed from scratch based on your product catalog.

faqs.q: How quickly will my products appear in ChatGPT?
faqs.a: Typically 2–4 weeks after integration. The full effect on AI-driven traffic is visible after 1–2 months once indexing stabilizes.

faqs.q: Does it work for the European market?
faqs.a: Yes. ChatGPT Shopping is rolling out across Europe — your products appear to users based on the relevance of their queries, regardless of country.

faqs.q: Do I need to change my website?
faqs.a: Usually no. I add technical markup (schema.org, robots.txt, feeds) without touching your design or UX.

faqs.q: Is the monthly plan required?
faqs.a: No. The starter is a one-time integration. The Growth plan is optional — for merchants who want continuous feed optimization and monitoring.
